calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-01-2019 Off Calendar

Plaintiff Equinix, Incs Notice Of Request For Entry Of Default Judgment And Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Jan-10-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendant Empire One Telecommunications, Inc., a Delaware corporation.
Dept. 514. Judge: Gail Dekreon. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Mitch L. Lyon, CSR #6840. Telephone: 415-551-3703.

Ryan J. Larsen, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Equinix, Inc., a Delaware corporation doing business in California.
Lisette Tchikovani, Billing Supervisor for plaintiff, was placed under oath and testified.
No appearance by defaulted defendant Empire One Telecommunications, Inc., a Delaware corporation.
Plaintiff's complaint for breach of written contract was filed on January 24, 2018, and personally served on January 25, 2018.
Default as to defendant Empire One Telecommunications, Inc., a Delaware corporation was entered on March 6, 2018.
DOE defendants were dismissed on September 18, 2018.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Equinix, Inc., a Delaware corporation doing business in California, and against the defaulted defendant, Empire One Telecommunications, Inc., a Delaware corporation, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $350,502.39.
Prejudgment Interest: $19,397.65.
Attorney Fees - $52,640.79.
Costs - $744.60.

Total - $423,285.43.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-10-2018 Continued To Feb-20-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Plaintiff Equinix, Incs Notice Of Request For Entry Of Default Judgment And Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Nov-20-2018 Continued To Jan-10-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 514
